campaigns.name: Summer Brand Awareness 2025
campaigns.description: A seasonal awareness push targeting consumers across Ireland and the UK. Focus on brand recall and top-of-funnel engagement.

campaigns.name: Q3 Enterprise Product Launch
campaigns.description: Targeted outreach to enterprise decision-makers for the launch of a new B2B SaaS product suite. High-intent audience, gated content strategy.
campaigns.email_subject: You're Invited: Exclusive Product Launch Event

campaigns.name: Holiday Season Promo 2025
campaigns.description: End-of-year promotional campaign targeting existing customers and warm leads. Incentivised offer with limited-time discount.
campaigns.email_subject: A Special Gift for You This Holiday Season 🎁

campaigns.name: EMEA Expansion Drive
campaigns.description: Market entry campaign across key EMEA markets. Goal is to generate qualified leads for the sales team in Germany, France, and the Netherlands.
campaigns.email_subject: Expanding Horizons Across EMEA — Join Us

campaigns.name: Partner Referral Programme
campaigns.description: Co-branded referral campaign targeting existing partner networks. Partners can refer contacts who are directed to a co-branded landing page.
campaigns.email_subject: Refer a Friend and Earn Rewards 🤝

events.name: Enterprise Launch Webinar — London
events.description: Live product demo and Q&A for enterprise prospects. Registration required.

events.name: Enterprise Launch Roundtable — Dublin
events.description: Intimate in-person roundtable for C-suite and senior leaders. Invitation only.

events.name: Summer Pop-up Experience — Cork
events.description: Consumer-facing brand activation event with interactive installations.

events.name: EMEA Partner Summit — Amsterdam
events.description: Annual partner summit with keynotes, workshops, and networking. Open to EMEA partners.

events.name: Partner Kickoff Call — Q4
events.description: Quarterly onboarding and briefing call for all referral programme partners.
